pages.text: Ring, Bracelet, and Compass are not three independent pickups. They are three mutually exclusive world paths, and the first one crafted defines the active identity of that world.
If you attempt to craft a different path later, the crafted result is removed and ingredients are refunded. The system prevents mid-run identity swaps and keeps progression coherent.
This lock is intentional design, not arbitrary restriction. Early choices should have long consequences, so team planning before first unique craft matters a lot.
Quick orientation: $(bold)Ring$() for survivability, $(bold)Bracelet$() for long-term consistency, $(bold)Compass$() for mobility and recovery control.
$(italic)Common mistake:$() picking by impulse instead of team style. Best path is the one your duo can execute cleanly for many hours, not the one that looks strongest on paper.
